feedback: Try to minimize filler words like 'um'. Pausing is a better way to gather your thoughts.
Avoid overusing 'like' as a filler word. It can distract from your message.
Using 'uh' frequently can make you sound less confident. Try taking a brief, silent pause instead.
Starting too many sentences with 'so' can disrupt your flow. Try varying your transitions.
Overusing words like 'basically' can detract from the substance of your point.
Relying on 'you know' can weaken your statements. State your points with confidence.
Using 'I mean' frequently might make it seem like you're second-guessing yourself.
